## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --exclude grove-gui --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --exclude grove-gui` passes
- [ ] GUI builds (`pnpm --dir crates/grove-gui/ui run build`), if touched
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
